\begin{problem}{Interactive Guessing}{standard input}{standard output}{2.0 seconds}{256 megabytes}

This is an interactive problem.
Guess the hidden number $X$ ($1 \le X \le N$) in at most 30 queries.

\inputfile
The first line of the input contains a single integer $N$ ($1 \le N \le 10^9$).

\outputfile
To make a query, output "? Y" where $1 \le Y \le N$. The judge will respond with:
\begin{itemize}
    \item ">" if the hidden number is greater than $Y$.
    \item "<" if the hidden number is less than $Y$.
    \item "=" if the hidden number is equal to $Y$.
\end{itemize}

When you know the answer, output "! Y" and terminate.

\example
\input{../../tests/01}
\output{../../tests/01.a}

\note
Make sure to flush your output stream after each query.

\end{problem}
